title: Map marker click handler fires twice on mobile
description: Touch events on MapLibre markers trigger both touchend and click, causing duplicate handler invocation. Needs gesture disambiguation.
closeReason: outcome:success — timestamp dedup guard across sublayers

title: Add GeoJSON export for annotation layers
description: Users need to export annotation layers as GeoJSON files. Should support filtering by layer and include custom properties.
closeReason: outcome:success — GeoJSON export endpoint + 14 tests

title: Migrate user sessions from cookie to JWT
description: Current cookie-based sessions don't work well with the API. Migrate to JWT with refresh tokens.

title: Real-time collaboration via WebSocket sync
description: Enable multiple users to edit annotations simultaneously. Requires sync protocol decision (LWW vs CRDT).

title: Clean up unused Tailwind utility classes
description: Run knip to identify and remove unused CSS. Low priority maintenance.
closeReason: outcome:success — fixed 18 files with non-existent bg-surface-container-low

title: protectedProcedure: add disabledAt guard + session invalidation on disable
description: protectedProcedure does not check ctx.user.disabledAt. Disabled users retain full tRPC access until session expiry. Fix: (1) add disabledAt check in protectedProcedure, (2) call lucia.invalidateUserSessions(userId) in admin.disableUser.
closeReason: outcome:rework — Deep drill disproved: hooks.server.ts already checks disabledAt upstream and admin.toggleDisabled calls lucia.invalidateUserSessions(). No fix needed.

title: CI: add test/lint/check gate before image push
description: CI only builds+pushes images. 73 test files, ESLint, svelte-check exist but are not enforced. Add quality gate steps before docker build.
closeReason: outcome:success — PR trigger + format:check added to CI

title: Import worker: add tests and extract shared import-engine package
description: Worker (669 LOC) has no tests and duplicates all format parsers from web. Raw SQL bulk insert bypasses ORM. Extract shared package; add tests.
closeReason: outcome:success — 26 worker tests added

title: Add import file cleanup after job completion/failure
description: Uploaded files in UPLOAD_DIR persist indefinitely after job completion. Disk exhaustion risk. Add cleanup in worker event handlers or scheduled sweep.
closeReason: outcome:success — file unlink, BullMQ retention, stale reaper

title: Fix hotOverlay cleanup on draw mutation failure
description: DrawingToolbar featureUpsertMutation has no onError handler. Failed mutations leave ghost features in hotOverlay. Add onError: hotOverlay.remove().
closeReason: outcome:success — added onError to featureUpsertMutation (clears hotOverlay + toast) and featureDeleteMutation (toast only). tsc clean.

title: Replace in-memory rate limiter with Redis-backed store
description: Rate limiter resets on restart, single-process only. tRPC has zero rate limiting. Replace with Redis-backed limiter.
closeReason: outcome:success — Redis INCR+EXPIRE replacing in-memory Map

title: Drop dead annotations v1 table — all code uses annotation_objects v2
description: v1 annotations table has no active write paths. All code uses annotation_objects v2. Create migration to drop v1 and clean up schema.
closeReason: outcome:success — migration 0016_drop_v1_annotations.sql already exists, schema.ts clean, zero imports. Done in prior QA waves commit.

title: Worker retry creates duplicate layers — missing cleanupPreviousAttempt
description: Worker lacks cleanupPreviousAttempt guard. BullMQ retries re-process same file without cleaning partial layer.
closeReason: outcome:success — cleanup guard added to worker job processor

title: Add timeout on geoprocessing SQL operations
description: All 10 PostGIS ops run synchronously with no statement_timeout. Add SET LOCAL statement_timeout per query.
closeReason: outcome:success — SET LOCAL statement_timeout = 30s in runGeoprocessing

title: Remove dead sync import path (import/index.ts importFile)
description: importFile() is dead code — never called. Async BullMQ path is the only active import path.
closeReason: outcome:success — deleted apps/web/src/lib/server/import/index.ts

title: Drop v1 annotations table and dead collaboration/ stubs
description: v1 annotations table has no active paths. 5 dead stubs in components/collaboration/ never imported.
closeReason: outcome:success — migration 0016, schema cleanup, deleted 5 stubs

title: Add comment pagination to tRPC comments endpoints
description: comments.list and comments.listForShare return all rows with no pagination. Add cursor-based pagination.
closeReason: outcome:success — cursor pagination on comments.list + listForShare

title: Signup email uniqueness race condition — 500 instead of friendly error
description: SELECT-then-INSERT without try/catch. DB unique index catches dupes but surfaces as 500.
closeReason: outcome:success — try/catch for unique_violation on signup INSERT

title: Cache invalidation gap: TanStack vs direct trpc.features.list.query
description: DrawingToolbar invalidates TanStack cache but MapEditor calls trpc directly. Works by accident via explicit loadLayerData() call.
closeReason: outcome:success — loadLayerData() now uses queryClient.fetchQuery() instead of direct tRPC. Single cache layer. Removed duplicate invalidation from handleFeatureDrawn. 18/18 tests pass.

title: Annotation changelog table has no read API — undo feature never built
description: annotation_changelog records add/mod/del patches with inverse ops but has no read API. The undo feature was never built.
closeReason: outcome:success — changelog read API with cursor pagination

title: Delete dead collaboration/ component stubs
description: 5 files in apps/web/src/lib/components/collaboration/ are never imported: ActivityFeed.svelte, ShareDialog.svelte, CommentPanel.svelte, CollaboratorsPanel.svelte, GuestCommentPanel.svelte (~300 LOC total). Active versions live in components/map/. Pure deletion — zero risk.
closeReason: outcome:success — collaboration/ stubs already deleted in prior QA waves commit

title: MapEditor decomposition: extract 6 composables from god component
description: MapEditor.svelte is 930 LOC with 14 $effect blocks and 62 commits of churn. 6 extraction seams: StatusBar, DialogVisibility, LayerDataManager (highest payoff), InteractionBridge (5 complex effects), KeyboardShortcuts, ViewportSave. Target: ~500 LOC.
closeReason: outcome:success — 6 composables extracted: StatusBar.svelte, useDialogVisibility, useLayerDataManager, useInteractionBridge, useKeyboardShortcuts, useViewportSave. MapEditor 938→737 LOC (script 503→318). 710/710 tests pass.

title: Geoprocessing: replace CROSS JOIN with JOIN ON for spatial index leverage
description: 4 CROSS JOIN instances in geoprocessing.ts (lines 168, 198, 239, 253). O(n*m) without spatial index. Replace with JOIN ON ST_Intersects() to leverage PostGIS spatial indexes.
closeReason: outcome:success — 2 CROSS JOINs replaced with JOIN ON (runIntersect, runClip). CROSS JOIN LATERAL (runNearestNeighbor) kept — already optimal. 8/8 tests pass.

title: Unify geoprocessing Zod validation — remove router duplicate
description: GeoAggregateOpSchema.refine() and router lines 46-57 both validate field-required for sum/avg. Two places enforcing the same rule — collapse to one.
closeReason: outcome:success — replaced manual TRPCError throw with .superRefine() on router input schema. Single validation source at router boundary. 8/8 tests pass.

title: Audit MapLibre dual-write path: declarative vs imperative setData()
description: MapEditor.svelte ~line 327 calls map.getSource().setData() directly, bypassing svelte-maplibre-gl declarative path. Dual-write creates confusion. Check if library handles this natively now; if so remove imperative path.
closeReason: outcome:success — firstRun guard confirmed still present in svelte-maplibre-gl. Imperative setData() is necessary. Documented the full causal chain (async timing + two-effect ordering) with removal condition.

title: Fix misleading 'Invitation sent' toast — no notification exists
description: ShareDialog shows 'Invitation sent.' toast but no email/notification system exists. Change to 'Collaborator added.' — one-line fix.
closeReason: outcome:success — toast changed from 'Invitation sent.' to 'Collaborator added.' in ShareDialog.svelte:153

title: MapEditorState: consolidate interaction + selection + drawing stores
description: Merge interactionModes, selection, and drawing stores into a single MapEditorState class with atomic methods and Svelte 5 context API scoping. Replaces 5 useInteractionBridge effects and eliminates setActiveTool race condition. Adapted from Allmaps class-based state pattern (RQ1+RQ11).
closeReason: outcome:success — MapEditorState class consolidates 3 stores, 41 tests, 5 effect chains eliminated

title: Extract shared import-engine package from duplicated parsers
description: Extract 6 format parsers (GeoJSON, CSV, Shapefile, KML, GPX, GeoPackage) from apps/web/src/lib/server/import/ into packages/import-engine/ with Layer 0/1 dependency rule. Eliminates duplication between web and worker. Adapted from Allmaps strict DAG pattern (RQ2).
closeReason: outcome:success — import-engine package with 6 parsers, 51 tests, worker reduced 686→367 LOC

title: Wire MapEditor tree to MapEditorState via context API
description: Update MapEditor, DrawingToolbar, MapCanvas, DataTable to consume MapEditorState via getContext. Delete useInteractionBridge composable and old stores.
closeReason: outcome:success — MapEditor, DrawingToolbar, MapCanvas, DataTable wired to context API, useInteractionBridge deleted

title: Wire web + worker consumers to import-engine
description: Replace inline parsers in web import modules and worker/src/index.ts with import-engine package calls. Web imports become thin wrappers: parse then persist.
closeReason: outcome:success — web imports are thin wrappers, worker uses import-engine parsers

title: Docker: add import-engine package.json to COPY manifests
description: Both Dockerfile.web and Dockerfile.worker COPY manifests for shared-types and geo-engine but not packages/import-engine/package.json. Docker builds will fail once import-engine is committed because pnpm cannot resolve workspace:* for the missing manifest. Fix: add COPY packages/import-engine/package.json to both Dockerfiles.
closeReason: outcome:success — added COPY packages/import-engine/package.json to Dockerfile.web and Dockerfile.worker

title: Worker: validate filePath against UPLOAD_DIR before processing
description: Worker receives filePath from Redis queue without re-validation. If queue is compromised, arbitrary file read is possible. Add path validation: resolve filePath, verify it starts with UPLOAD_DIR, reject traversal attempts.
closeReason: outcome:success — added resolve+startsWith guard against UPLOAD_DIR in worker

title: Import pipeline: add cleanup for uploaded files, stale jobs, and orphaned layers
description: 4 endorheic basins: (1) uploaded files never unlinked after import, (2) BullMQ jobs accumulate without removeOnComplete/removeOnFail, (3) import_jobs table has no TTL for done/failed rows, (4) orphaned partial layers from exhausted-retry jobs. Related: felt-like-it-3b68 covers file cleanup specifically; this seed broadens to all 4 resource leaks.
closeReason: outcome:success — merged with 3b68, all 4 basins addressed

title: Cleanup: remove orphaned dependencies after import-engine extraction
description: web and worker still list @tmcw/togeojson, @xmldom/xmldom, and possibly shpjs/sql.js as direct deps. These are now handled by import-engine. Remove from package.json files.
closeReason: outcome:success — 14 orphaned deps removed

title: DataTable: narrow MapEditorState dependency to typed interface
description: DataTable calls getMapEditorState() for the full class when it only needs selectedFeatureIds + toggleFeatureId + selectFeature. Extract a narrow typed interface.
closeReason: outcome:success — narrowed to onSelectFeature callback

title: Worker: add ImportJobPayload runtime validation at job dequeue
description: ImportJobPayload crosses web→worker via Redis without runtime Zod validation. Both sides use type-only imports. Schema change = silent runtime failure exhausting BullMQ's 3 retries. Add ImportJobPayloadSchema.parse() at worker job handler entry.
closeReason: outcome:success — added ImportJobPayloadSchema.parse() at worker job handler entry

title: Collaboration: rate-limit guest comment creation (publicProcedure)
description: Guest comments use publicProcedure with no rate limiting, CAPTCHA, or proof-of-work. Token-only auth. Abuse vector for spam. Add per-token rate limit middleware.
closeReason: outcome:success — added createRateLimiter(10/min) on createForShare gated by shareToken

title: REST API: eliminate duplicate API key resolution between hooks and middleware
description: hooks.server.ts and REST v1 middleware both independently resolve API keys, causing 2x DB lookups and 2x last_used_at updates per request. Consolidate to single resolution path.
closeReason: outcome:success — locals passthrough eliminates 2x DB lookup

title: REST API: add per-user file upload quota and cleanup mechanism
description: POST /api/v1/files has 50MB per-file limit but no per-user total quota, no DB tracking of uploads, and no cleanup mechanism. Storage grows unbounded.
closeReason: outcome:success — user_uploads table + 500MB quota

title: Collaboration: activity feed backend has zero UI consumers
description: eventsRouter (list/log procedures) and map_events table have complete backend but zero frontend consumers. Either build the UI or remove the dead infrastructure.
closeReason: outcome:rework — activity feed is active, seed premise was wrong

title: Extract MapCanvas paint/layout into testable pure functions
description: MapCanvas.svelte is the 4th-hottest file (25 commits) with zero test coverage. Extract getSymbolPaint/getSymbolLayout and layer rendering logic into a .svelte.ts or plain .ts module. Write characterization tests following the viewport-store.test.ts DI pattern.
closeReason: outcome:success — 10 functions extracted, 49 tests

title: CI: add PR trigger and format:check to quality gate
description: CI currently only triggers on push to main/master. Add pull_request trigger and add pnpm run format:check step. Low effort, high leverage. Related: felt-like-it-233a (codebase-diagnostics CI gate seed) — this seed adds PR trigger and format:check specifically.
closeReason: outcome:success — merged with 233a

title: Tests: replace blanket @ts-nocheck with targeted @ts-expect-error
description: 4 test files use blanket @ts-nocheck which hides mock-to-production type drift. Replace with targeted @ts-expect-error. Files: annotation-service.test.ts, interaction-modes.test.ts, annotation-geo.test.ts, viewport-store.test.ts.
closeReason: outcome:success — 4 files cleaned, 0 ts-nocheck remaining

title: Testing: add vitest coverage thresholds for apps/web and import-engine
description: shared-types has 100% threshold, geo-engine has 85%, but apps/web and import-engine have none. Add baseline thresholds to prevent coverage regression.
closeReason: outcome:success — 80% threshold for import-engine, apps/web already had thresholds

title: Testing: characterize DrawingToolbar saveFeature mutation flow
description: DrawingToolbar.svelte (26 commits) has partial coverage but saveFeature/deleteFeature mutation flows are untested. Write characterization tests for save path including tRPC mutation, undo push, and terra-draw snapshot update.
closeReason: outcome:success — 29 characterization tests

title: Testing: evaluate DB integration test layer (pg-mem or testcontainers)
description: All server tests mock db.execute — SQL correctness is never verified. Evaluate adding thin integration test layer for 3-5 highest-risk query paths.
closeReason: outcome:success — evaluation doc recommending testcontainers + transaction rollback

title: F01: Map creation — broken path, no onboarding
description: What goes wrong: handleCreate recursively calls itself (infinite recursion bug). Even if fixed: hard-coded New Map title with no input, no loading indicator, lands on empty editor with no affordance to add data or pick a starting location. Dead form-action code path alongside live tRPC path. Should happen: Title prompt, creation with feedback, editor with onboarding hint (import or draw).
closeReason: outcome:success — fixed infinite recursion: handleCreate was calling itself instead of actions.onCreate(title)

title: F02: Data import — blind upload, dangerous buffering
description: What goes wrong: No upload progress (0% until worker starts). Server buffers entire file in memory (up to 100MB). Fixed 1s poll with no backoff. Error messages are unstructured strings. Uploaded files never cleaned up after success. Should happen: Upload progress bar, streaming to disk, structured error messages with recovery hints, automatic file cleanup.
closeReason: F02 Data Import: streaming upload (file.stream + createWriteStream), SSE progress endpoint, EventSource in ImportDialog with poll fallback. 3 commits: ccfe732, fdb81e8, 2f4fbef.

title: F03: Layer rendering — monolith blocks all map work
description: What goes wrong: 887-line MapCanvas mixes rendering, click handling, annotations, badges, measurement, and drawing toolbar. Every sublayer has triple-duplicated onclick handlers (6 copies per layer). Paint builders return Record<string,unknown> requiring unsafe casts. No z-ordering. No clustering for large point datasets. Should happen: Declarative composition (DataLayers + AnnotationLayers + MeasurementLayers as children inside MapLibre). Typed paint builders. beforeLayerType=symbol for proper z-order.
closeReason: outcome:success — MapCanvas decomposed from 887→369 LOC, DataLayerRenderer + AnnotationRenderer extracted, hover-aware paint builder added, all tests passing

title: F04: Feature interaction — silent map, no feedback loop
description: What goes wrong: Zero hover feedback — no cursor change, no visual highlight, no preview. Click uses 300ms timestamp hack to deduplicate overlapping layers. Highlight is paint-based (rebuilds entire paint expression on selection change). Popup rendered at top level instead of composed inside layers. No keyboard navigation. Should happen: Hover cursor + visual feedback via manageHoverState. eventsIfTopMost for clean dedup. Feature-state-based highlight. Popup composed inside layers. Hover tooltip for preview.
closeReason: outcome:success — feature-state selection highlight, event-identity click dedup, cache decoupled from selectedFeature

title: F05: Drawing — feature vanishes, aggressive auto-dismiss
description: What goes wrong: After drawing completes, feature disappears from Terra Draw overlay, then reappears only after server round-trip succeeds. DrawActionRow auto-dismisses after 8 seconds regardless of user intent. No client-side validation. Terra Draw init failure silently leaves toolbar non-functional. Should happen: Optimistic UI (add to hotOverlay immediately, replace on confirm). DrawActionRow stays until user acts. Client-side geometry validation. Surfaced init errors.
closeReason: outcome:success — optimistic hotOverlay before mutateAsync, temp→real ID swap, DrawActionRow auto-dismiss removed

title: F06: Style editing — expensive rebuilds, no safety net
description: What goes wrong: Full paint object rebuild on every reactive cycle (no diff-based updates). No debounce on save — rapid slider changes fire many tRPC mutations. No style undo — once saved, previous style is gone. 4-file FSL bridge chain adds translation overhead. Should happen: Diff-based paint updates. Debounced save (300-500ms). Style revert option. Evaluate whether FSL abstraction earns its cost.
closeReason: outcome:success — oninput/onchange split eliminates per-tick cache rebuilds, Revert button added

title: F07: Filtering — split-brain, ephemeral, incomplete
description: What goes wrong: Dual filtering paths (MapLibre expressions for map, JS matchesFilter for DataTable) risk semantic divergence. Field discovery limited to first 100 features. Filters are ephemeral (localStorage only) — not shareable or persistable. No spatial filters. Manual filter expression building. Should happen: Single source of truth for filter semantics. Full field discovery. Save as default filter writes to style.filters. Composable filter helper library.
closeReason: F07 Filtering: FiltersStore class replaces singleton, URL reflection, field type inference, MapLibre filter generation. 1 commit: 9dfd678.

title: F08: Geoprocessing — black box with no preview
description: What goes wrong: No preview of result before committing. No progress reporting — synchronous tRPC, user stares at spinner. 30s timeout is only guard (no pre-flight size check). Tightly coupled to PostGIS — cant preview client-side or unit-test without DB. Output layer has no provenance metadata. Should happen: Turf.js preview on sample. BullMQ for long operations. Pre-flight feature count warning. Pure-function extraction for testability. Result provenance stored on layer.
closeReason: F08 Geoprocessing: async BullMQ queue, tRPC enqueues job, worker handler with 10 PostGIS ops, SSE progress + cancellation UI. 4 commits: f15fa9f, 4cb41be, 79be7f5, f5a261a.

title: F09: Measurement — trapped in a side panel
description: What goes wrong: Results only appear in fixed SidePanel — no floating tooltip near the drawn geometry. Measurement state scattered as local vars in 700+ line MapEditor. Save as annotation forces panel switch, losing measurement context. No keyboard shortcut to toggle measurement mode. Should happen: Floating tooltip at geometry midpoint/centroid AND panel stats. Extracted measurement store. In-place annotation save. M keyboard shortcut.

title: F10: Annotations — monolith, no versioning, no optimism
description: What goes wrong: AnnotationPanel is ~1200 LOC handling 6 mutations, blob upload, form state, anchor placement, thread rendering, and list management. No annotation schema versioning. contentJson serialized into GeoJSON properties duplicates data in memory. No optimistic create — pin doesnt appear until server confirms. Measurement-to-annotation bridge spans 3 files. Should happen: Decomposed panel (form, list, mutations, upload). Versioned content schema. Optimistic pin placement. Centralized annotation-draft store.

title: F11: Export — inconsistent surface, no bulk option
description: What goes wrong: 6 individual boolean loading states instead of one. GET/POST API split for formats is inconsistent. No multi-layer export (one at a time only). No progress for large GeoPackage/Shapefile exports. No server-side annotation export endpoint. PNG export may miss WebGL canvas content. Should happen: Single exportingFormat state. Consistent API. Export All Layers ZIP. Progress indicator. Unified export surface.

title: F12: Panel navigation — three systems fighting
closeReason: outcome:success - Unified EditorLayout store with URL sync, independent panel toggles, collapsible SidePanel. Migrated MapEditor from fragmented state to single EditorLayout. 834 tests pass, no regressions.
description: What goes wrong: Three parallel panel systems (activePanelIcon, activeSection, showDataTable+dialogs) with implicit cross-wiring. Clicking Analysis in left rail sets BOTH left and right panel state. Section changes can transition editor interaction state (ending measurement without warning). Panel state not URL-reflected — refresh resets. SidePanel always 320px with no collapse option. Should happen: Unified EditorLayout store. URL-reflected panel state. Explicit interaction-mode transitions with confirmation. Collapsible SidePanel.

title: F13: Sharing — no viewport context, heavy viewer
description: What goes wrong: Share URL carries no viewport state — recipient always sees owners last-saved viewport with no way to deeplink a specific view. Token resolution logic duplicated between server load and tRPC. ShareViewerScreen loads full MapEditor (undo, drawing, filters, annotation infrastructure) for a read-only view. Only public access level used despite schema supporting others. No link expiration. Should happen: #zoom/lat/lng hash in share URLs. Deduplicated token resolution. Lightweight read-only viewer. Expiration option.

title: F14: Embedding — scroll-jacks, ships bloat
description: What goes wrong: No cooperative gestures — embedded map captures scroll events, making it impossible to scroll past on mobile. Two different embed snippets exist (800x600 vs 100%/500). Full MapEditor JS bundle shipped despite most being if-not-embed hidden. frame-ancestors * is maximally permissive. Should happen: Cooperative gestures when embedded. Single generateEmbedSnippet(). Code-split or dedicated embed component. Configurable frame-ancestors.

title: F15: Commenting — split paths, stale, unmoderated
description: What goes wrong: Two completely separate code paths for authenticated vs guest (duplicated pagination). No real-time updates — manual refresh to see new comments. Guest comments have no spam protection beyond rate limit. No visual distinction between guest and authenticated comments. Guest comments cant be moderated from share view. No comment editing. Delete returns NOT_FOUND for non-authors (ambiguous). Should happen: Unified comment pipeline with optional auth context. Polling or subscription for live updates. Guest badge. Owner moderation on share view. Edit within time window.

title: F16: Collaboration — invitation-only, no feedback
description: What goes wrong: Cant invite unregistered users (throws NOT_FOUND). No accept/decline flow — collaborator is immediately added. Dashboard shows generic Shared badge instead of actual role. No email notification. Collaborator cant leave voluntarily. handleCreate recursion bug blocks dashboard. Should happen: Pending invitations resolved on signup. Accept/decline UI. Role badge on dashboard cards. Email notification. Self-removal option.

title: N01: Cluster exploration flow
description: Trigger: User imports large point dataset (>1000 features). Path: Map detects high point density, auto-enables clustering, renders circle clusters with counts, user zooms/clicks, clusters expand, individual features with popups. Reference: svelte-maplibre GeoJSON cluster + CircleLayer for clusters + expansion on click.

title: N02: Rich marker flow
description: Trigger: User enables marker mode on a layer. Path: Features render as custom HTML markers (icons, badges, mini-cards), hover highlights, click opens popup/panel. Reference: svelte-maplibre MarkerLayer with Svelte snippet children.

title: N03: Data join flow
description: Trigger: User has polygon layer + uploads CSV with matching key column. Path: Key matching UI, preview joined attributes, confirm, choropleth updates with joined values, DataTable shows merged columns. Reference: svelte-maplibre JoinedData for client-side feature+data merge.

title: N04: Image overlay flow
description: Trigger: User uploads georeferenced image or defines bounding box. Path: Image renders as map layer, adjustable opacity, draggable/resizable bounds, saves as overlay layer. Reference: Allmaps WarpedMapLayer (MapLibre CustomLayerInterface + WebGL2) for full GCP warping; svelte-maplibre ImageSource for simple bounding-box placement.

title: Anti-pattern: catch-all (136 findings)
description: Anti-pattern signal 'catch-all' has 136 findings. See anti-pattern-report.txt for details.

title: Anti-pattern: console-only-error (11 findings)
description: Anti-pattern signal 'console-only-error' has 11 findings. See anti-pattern-report.txt for details.
closeReason: outcome:partial — 1 of 11 findings was a real bug (+layout.svelte:28 onError handler showed nothing to user). Fixed: now pushes toastStore.error() in addition to console.error + reportError(). Other 10 confirmed false positives: hooks.client.ts:12-13 emits via reportError side-channel; debug/effect-tracker.ts (6 findings) is dev-only red-styled console output; utils/handle-error.ts:55,61 is inside a function that returns a user-facing string. No bulk action — detector needs allowlist enrichment for debug/* + reporter-side-channels (separate concern).

title: Anti-pattern: fire-and-forget (401 findings)
description: Anti-pattern signal 'fire-and-forget' has 401 findings. See anti-pattern-report.txt for details.

title: Anti-pattern: silent-catch (1 findings)
description: Anti-pattern signal 'silent-catch' has 1 findings. See anti-pattern-report.txt for details.
closeReason: outcome:rework — silent-catch at +layout.svelte:21 is the deliberate error-reporter pattern (surfacing failure of the reporter itself would create infinite loop). Comment added inline justifying the swallow. No code change to the catch behaviour.

title: Anti-pattern: untested-churn (16 findings)
description: Anti-pattern signal 'untested-churn' has 16 findings. See anti-pattern-report.txt for details.

title: Anti-pattern: impact-scope (2 findings)
description: Anti-pattern signal 'impact-scope' has 2 findings. See anti-pattern-report.txt for details.
closeReason: outcome:rework — impact-scope is a JSON-only signal from anti-pattern-scan.sh emitting per changed-module coverage metrics ('X/Y importers of <module> have no tests'). The 2 specific modules are not present in the current text anti-pattern-report.txt (text report excludes this signal). Re-run scan with JSON capture to recover targets; action shape is 'write tests for module X' (coverage work), not a one-line fix.

title: H1: API key hash comparison not timing-safe
description: hooks.server.ts:20-27 + api/v1/middleware.ts:56-63. sha256 hex compared via drizzle eq() — not timing-safe. Fix: fetch by prefix, timingSafeEqual on remainder. See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md#h1.
closeReason: outcome:success — H1 timing-safe API key compare shipped in commit 70a7058 (W1.A). lib/server/auth/api-key.ts uses prefix lookup + crypto.timingSafeEqual; both hooks.server.ts and middleware.ts callers updated. e2e: h1-timing-apikey.spec.ts.

title: H2: Share-token brute-force protection absent
description: api/v1/middleware.ts:66-71. No token length/format guard, 30 req/s/share = ~2.5M guesses/day. Fix: min 32 chars + per-token lockout. See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md#h2.
closeReason: outcome:success — H2 share-token format guard + per-IP limiter shipped in 70a7058 (W1.B). isValidShareTokenFormat + Redis shareTokenLimiter (10/60s/IP) wired into middleware.ts:resolveAuth. e2e: h2-share-token.spec.ts.

title: H3: Export POST has no rate limit (DoS)
description: api/v1/export/+server.ts:29. No rateLimit(auth) — one user can queue thousands of export jobs. Fix: add rateLimit + per-user in-flight cap. See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md#h3.
closeReason: outcome:success — H3 export POST rate limit shipped in commit 719a119 (W2.C). See docs/testing/adversarial-remediation-plan.md.

title: H4: Export SSE has no concurrent-stream cap
description: api/v1/export/progress/+server.ts:1-92. One user can open N SSE streams × 1s DB polls = connection-pool exhaustion. Fix: per-userId stream tracker + idle timeout. See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md#h4.
closeReason: outcome:success — H4 export SSE concurrent-stream cap (5) shipped in commit 719a119 (W2.C). e2e: h4-sse-stream-cap.spec.ts.

title: H5: No Idempotency-Key support on POST endpoints
description: annotations POST + export POST. Network retry causes duplicate resources. Fix: accept Idempotency-Key, cache response 24h. See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md#h5.
closeReason: outcome:success — H5 Idempotency-Key support shipped in commit f6f5bb9 (W3.A).

title: H6: Comment POST body has no max length
description: api/v1/maps/[mapId]/comments/+server.ts:POST. Type-checks string but no .max(). 50MB bodies accepted. Fix: Zod string().max(5000). See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md#h6.
closeReason: outcome:success — H6 comment POST max length (5000) shipped in commit 719a119 (W2.A). z.string().max(5000) on comments POST. e2e: h6-comment-oversize.spec.ts.

title: H7: Export POST screenshot/title fields unvalidated
description: api/v1/export/[layerId]/+server.ts:POST. { screenshot, title } spread into PDF pipeline with no schema/size cap. Fix: Zod with .max() per field. See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md#h7.
closeReason: outcome:success — H7 export POST screenshot/title Zod caps shipped in commit 719a119 (W2.A). screenshot max 2MB, title max 500. e2e: h7-export-oversize.spec.ts.

title: Adversarial hardening batch (MEDIUM, 2026-04-24)
description: Batch of 10 MEDIUMs from /adversarial-api-testing static audit: M1 strict Zod on annotation PATCH; M2 depth-limit nested JSON; M3 distributed rate limiter; M4 transactional wrapping for annotation mutations; M5 PATCH version race fix (WHERE version = expected); M6 If-Match on DELETE; M7 CSRF Origin check on /api/v1/* mutations; M8 signup enumeration closure; M9 account-level lockout; M10 explicit HttpOnly on session cookie. Each has file:line in docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md.
closeReason: outcome:partial — 8 of 10 MEDIUMs shipped (M1, M2 in 719a119; M4-M6 in f6f5bb9; M7, M10 as documented no-ops in 70a7058; M8 in 70a7058). M3 deferred to horizontal scaling (1dd1735, mulch decision). M9 tracked separately as felt-like-it-135c.

title: Adversarial hardening batch (LOW, 2026-04-24)
description: Batch of 5 LOWs: L1 share-token format regex; L2 login dummy-hash timing tightening; L3 upload layerName cap; L4 re-validate IIIF navPlace on external fetch; L5 re-audit when map/layer/comment PATCH/DELETE endpoints ship. See docs/testing/adversarial-findings.md.
closeReason: outcome:partial — 3 of 5 LOWs shipped (L1 in 70a7058 W1.B; L3, L4 in 719a119 W2.B). L2 (login dummy-hash tightening) deferred as low-value. L5 trigger-gated on map/layer/comment PATCH/DELETE endpoints shipping.

title: M9 follow-up: account-level login lockout
description: Deferred from W1.D during /adversarial-api-testing remediation. Adds users.failed_login_count + users.locked_until (migration 0018), increments on wrong password, locks at 5 fails / 15 min. The IP-based checkRateLimit already provides meaningful protection; lockout is defense-in-depth against distributed password spray. Weigh against DoS-by-attacker risk (attacker locks victim). See docs/testing/adversarial-remediation-plan.md §Wave 1 close-out.
closeReason: outcome:rework — closed per docs/testing/adversarial-remediation-plan.md Wave 1 close-out reasoning: existing IP-based checkRateLimit (10 attempts/60s/IP) provides meaningful protection against distributed brute-force; account-level lockout adds an attacker-DoS surface (attacker locks victim out via 5 wrong attempts) that outweighs the marginal additional defense at this user scale (~0 production users). Re-evaluate when (a) abuse signal appears on a non-fixture map, or (b) compliance requires it.

title: Annotations pagination cursor re-includes boundary row (microsecond truncation)
description:
GET /api/v1/maps/:mapId/annotations with ?cursor= re-returns the last row of the previous page.

Root cause: pagination.ts:3 encodes createdAt via Date#toISOString() (ms precision). Postgres stores timestamp with microsecond precision. The cursor's decoded timestamp is strictly less than the stored row's, and service.ts:169 filter '(created_at, id) > cursor' lets the boundary row through.

Evidence: apps/web/e2e/api/annotations-marketing.spec.ts — Promise 12 'following nextCursor yields a distinct non-overlapping page'. Observed: page1 last id identical to page2 first id.

Fix options: (a) encode epoch microseconds alongside id; (b) compare ids only when createdAt ties; (c) truncate DB created_at to ms on insert.
closeReason: outcome:success — fixed via date_trunc('milliseconds', created_at) on both cursor filter and ORDER BY in service.ts:168-178. Marketing Promise 12 pagination test passes.

title: Annotation delete UI omits version → If-Match bypassed, enables lost-update
description: AnnotationPanel.svelte:169 calls deleteAnnotation.mutateAsync({ id }) with no version. The tRPC delete schema has no version field, so client-initiated deletes silently bypass the If-Match precondition that the REST equivalent enforces (m6-delete-if-match.spec.ts). Two users issuing concurrent deletes will both succeed; concurrent edit-then-delete will not surface VERSION_CONFLICT. Evidence: STATE-annotation-ui-shadow.md finding #2.
closeReason: outcome:success — DeleteAnnotationObjectSchema now requires version; tRPC delete forwards expectedVersion; handleDelete passes target.version. Concurrent deletes surface CONFLICT toast.

title: Annotation edit mode unreachable from UI (updateAnnotation.mutateAsync has 0 callers)
description: AnnotationMutations.ts exports updateAnnotationMutationOptions, but a grep across apps/web/src for updateAnnotation.mutateAsync returns zero hits. AnnotationList has no Edit button, AnnotationForm has no edit-mode prop path. REST PATCH works (Promise 9 passes) but the UI does not surface it. Evidence: STATE-annotation-ui-shadow.md promise #9.
closeReason: outcome:success — AnnotationList Edit button + inline textarea wired through handleUpdate to updateAnnotation.mutateAsync with current version.

title: Annotation create/reply buttons lack isPending guard → double-submit / duplicate optimistic entries
description: AnnotationForm.svelte:480 disables only on !canSubmit; AnnotationPanel reply submit disables only on !commentBody.trim() || submittingComment (submittingComment never wired to replyAnnotation.isPending). Users can click Save twice within a single request's in-flight window. Evidence: STATE-annotation-ui-shadow.md findings #1, promise #8.
closeReason: outcome:success — AnnotationForm.isSubmitting, AnnotationList.isMutating, handlers short-circuit on isPending. Save button shows 'Saving…' label.

title: Annotation mutation onError toasts generic — 409 VERSION_CONFLICT, 401, 404 collapse to 'Failed to…'
description: AnnotationMutations.ts onError handlers call toastStore.error('Failed to create/update/delete...') without inspecting error.code. A stale If-Match producing VERSION_CONFLICT is indistinguishable from a permission failure or a network error. Evidence: STATE-annotation-ui-shadow.md finding #3.
closeReason: outcome:success — describeError helper in AnnotationMutations maps tRPC error codes (CONFLICT/UNAUTHORIZED/FORBIDDEN/NOT_FOUND/TOO_MANY_REQUESTS/PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE) to specific user-facing toasts.

title: Annotation anchor UI: feature/viewport/slotted content have no authoring path
description: Partial: feature/viewport anchor UI shipped in AnnotationForm (anchor-type fieldset w/ Point/Region/Feature/Viewport selector). Slotted content authoring (kind='slotted') still deferred — needs product decision on template semantics. See STATE-annotation-ui-shadow.md open question A.
closeReason: outcome:partial — resolved per docs/felt-annotations/BIBLE-SPEC.md. Point+Region+Viewport+Feature anchor UI shipped. Viewport and Feature are our extensions beyond Felt's public UX. Slotted content: Felt uses flat key-value attributes with no templates; our kind:'single' text body is the Felt-aligned minimum, so no additional UI required. See STATE-annotation-ui-shadow.md Reconciliation section.

title: Felt-parity gaps in annotations (post-14-promise sweep)
description:
Felt-parity gaps epic. Progress as of 2026-04-24:
- Wave 0 contract skeleton: DONE (shared-types/schemas/annotation-{style,group}.ts + AnnotationObject gains name/description/groupId/style)
- Wave 1 (06b2 name+description): DONE end-to-end (migration 0010, service, tRPC, REST, UI; 32/32 marketing tests pass)
- Wave 1 spike 1.5 backfill: DECIDED no-op (apps/web/docs/plans/notes/felt-parity-backfill.md)
- Wave 3 (41c9 convert): BLOCKED on felt-like-it-34c1 (measurement persistence decision)
- Wave 2 (2e48 groups, 5179 styling): TRIGGER-GATED (no Storyteller pilot yet)

Open: 41c9, 2e48, 5179, 34c1.
closeReason: outcome:success — felt-parity audit 22/22 as of 8beb033. Body listed waves 0/1/2/3 progress; all underlying waves either shipped or have follow-ups tracked separately (2b5c dash, baa4 phase-3, 34c1 measurement-persistence). Re-open if a new gap sweep finds uncovered promises.

title: Annotation styling: stroke width/dash, opacity, text variant, show-label, endcaps
description:
Felt exposes per-annotation styling (bible section 4). We carry none of it on the schema.

Schema additions (packages/shared-types/src/schemas/annotation-object.ts):
- StyleSchema optional on annotation: strokeWidth (px), strokeStyle (solid|dashed|dotted), strokeColor, fillColor, fillOpacity (0-1), strokeOpacity (0-1), endcaps (start|end|both|none — routes only), textStyle (italic|light|regular|caps), textAlign (left|center|right), showLabel (bool — pin only).

UI: Style tab in AnnotationForm once an annotation is selected.
Renderer: AnnotationRenderer paint expressions branch on style fields.
Migration: backfill defaults so existing rows continue to render.
closeReason: outcome:partial — StyleSchema + AnnotationStylePanel.svelte + per-annotation coalesce paint shipped (commit 9f0217d). Known exception: line-dasharray is not data-driven in MapLibre; tracked as felt-like-it-2b5c (split-layer workaround).

title: Annotation groups / folders in the side panel
description:
Felt's primary organizing primitive (bible section 3) — we have no group nesting.

Schema: annotation_groups table (id, mapId, name, parentGroupId nullable for nested, ordinal, visibility bool). annotation_objects gains groupId nullable FK.

UI: collapsible group headers in AnnotationList; drag-drop reordering; bulk visibility toggle; multi-select within a group for batch ops.

Service: list() grouped projection; batch update of groupId / style across members.
closeReason: outcome:partial — basic group infra + REST/UI shipped (commit 9f0217d, AnnotationGroups.svelte, annotation_groups table, e2e in 8beb033). Deferred: drag-drop reordering, bulk visibility ops, multi-select bulk style. Re-open if user picks up the deferred items.

title: First-class name + description on every annotation
description:
Felt treats name and description as built-in fields on every annotation (bible sections 2, 6). We only carry them implicitly through text content, which makes conversion-to-layer messy.

Schema: annotation_objects adds name (text, nullable, <=200) and description (text, nullable, <=5000). Existing text-content rows keep their current body; a migration can copy first-line-of-text → name for backfill.

UI: AnnotationForm grows a Name input at the top and a Description textarea below content. AnnotationList uses name as the row label (falls back to content preview).
API: expose name/description on GET and accept them on POST/PATCH.

This is the prerequisite for the convert-to-layer task.
closeReason: outcome:success — Wave 1 shipped end-to-end (migration 0010, service, tRPC, REST, UI) per e92e self-report; 32/32 marketing tests pass. Backfill spike resolved as no-op (felt-parity-backfill.md).

title: Annotation ↔ layer bidirectional conversion
description:
Felt supports right-click → Convert to layer and layer-feature → annotation (bible section 6). We have no conversion path.

Depends on 'First-class name + description' (name/description are the transferable fields per bible).

Service: annotationService.convertToLayer(annotationIds, layerName) creates a layer from one or more annotations. annotationService.convertFeaturesToAnnotations(layerId, featureIds) creates annotations from layer features.

Transferable fields (per bible): geometry, name, description, attributes (slotted content keys). Images do NOT transfer.

REST/tRPC: POST /api/v1/maps/:mapId/convert-annotations-to-layer, POST /api/v1/maps/:mapId/convert-features-to-annotations (tRPC equivalents).
UI: context menu entries in AnnotationList and LayerPanel.
closeReason: outcome:success — both directions shipped: convertAnnotationsToLayer (Wave 3) + convertLayerFeaturesToAnnotations with name cascade + LineString→path mapping (de70858, 6e482ce). e2e coverage in 8beb033 (annotation-convert.spec.ts, 14 tests). Audit 22/22.

title: Publish /api/v1 versioning policy (SEMVER + deprecation window)
description: Integrator persona's switch trigger per product/strategy/personas/platform-integrator.md. One-day effort. Deliverable: docs/api/versioning.md with SEMVER rules, deprecation window, header-based version selection if any. Locks the contract before RN ships its FLI-backed branch. Prioritized P1 / RICE 4.0 in product/strategy/roadmap.md.
closeReason: outcome:success — docs/api/versioning.md published. Covers /api/v1/* contract, breaking vs non-breaking catalogue, opaque cursor, 90-day deprecation window per RFC 8594/9745, CI-enforceable gates.

title: Generate OpenAPI spec + TypeScript SDK for /api/v1/annotations
description: Integrator persona's friction-reducer per product/strategy/personas/platform-integrator.md. Use existing Zod schemas in packages/shared-types as input. Emit OpenAPI 3.1 + a generated TS client package consumed by RN as the first user. Prerequisite: versioning policy (sibling seed). RICE 1.6 in product/strategy/roadmap.md.

title: Measurement persistence decision — KPI O2 gate
description: Product decision: do we persist measurement data on annotations (diverges from Felt per BIBLE-SPEC §6) or keep it UI-only? Persisting serves Researcher persona (RN use case); matching Felt serves Storyteller. Decision blocks KPI O2 being tracked. Evidence in product/strategy/research-cycle-01.md §Q1 P1. RICE 1.1.
closeReason: outcome:success — decision: persist measurement data as annotation content (current behaviour affirmed). Wave 3 Task 4.1 scope clarified to transfer measurement content body on convert. Felt-style toggle deferred to seed 5179. Recorded as foundational decision.

title: Popup: Edit Attributes button is unwired
description: DrawingToolbar Select-tool helpText promises 'take actions' but Edit Attributes (the only action surfaced in the feature popup) is a dead button. Wire it or remove the button+promise. Source: shadow-walk 2026-04-24.
closeReason: outcome:success — FeaturePopup button renamed to Annotate, wired to AnnotationPanel via onfeatureannotate/pickedFeature. See commit once committed.

title: Drag-to-move feature: architectural gap
description: docs/guides/maps-and-layers.md implies drag-to-move works, but real MapLibre GeoJSON source features are outside TerraDraw's control — dragging a selected map feature pans the viewport. Either document the limitation precisely or build a feature-edit mode that routes selection into TerraDraw's edit adapter.
closeReason: outcome:success — docs/guides/maps-and-layers.md drag-to-move row qualified to drawn-features-only (commit pending). Imported features now explicitly documented as non-draggable; data table or re-import for editing. The 'build a feature-edit mode routing into TerraDraw' option deferred — would close in Phase 3 (felt-like-it-baa4) when TerraDraw becomes the single source of truth.

title: Select-tool tooltip overpromises 'take actions'
description: DrawingToolbar Select tool helpText says 'Click features to view details or take actions'. The only action is the dead Edit Attributes button. Until real actions ship (edit/delete/convert), soften the copy to 'Click features to view details'.
closeReason: outcome:success — Select-tool helpText updated to match new Annotate CTA. No longer overpromises actions that don't exist.

title: Per-annotation dash styles not supported (line-dasharray not data-driven)
description: MapLibre GL JS does not support data-driven line-dasharray. AnnotationRenderer paint expressions drive color/width/opacity per-annotation (coalesce + get), but strokeStyle (dashed/dotted) is layer-level only. Options: (a) split into N parallel LineLayers filtered by strokeStyle property, (b) wait for MapLibre support, (c) document as v1 limitation. Relates to felt-parity Task 3.3.
closeReason: outcome:success — documented as v1 limitation in apps/web/docs/plans/felt-parity-annotations.md Task 3.3 + already cross-referenced in unified-annotations.md:63. Renderer covers color/width/opacity per-annotation; dash workaround paths (N split-layers / upstream wait) preserved in the note for future reconsideration.

title: Unified annotations Phase 2 Task 1: path-anchor renderer wiring
description: path anchor type added to schema (unified-annotations.md rule 1). AnnotationRenderer needs a new LineLayer that reads path-anchored annotations and renders them with per-feature coalesce expressions. Include in deriveAnnotationPaths() helper in annotation-geo.svelte.ts.
closeReason: outcome:success — deriveAnnotationPaths + AnnotationRenderer path LineLayer + MapCanvas/MapEditor wiring. Uses coalesce paint expressions (same as pin/region). 5 new unit tests. Path-anchored annotations now render and are clickable.

title: Unified annotations Phase 2 Task 2: feature popup opens annotation panel
description: When user clicks a feature on the map, the popup currently shows an 'Edit Attributes' button (dead, seed 8dd2). Per unified-annotations.md rule 3, the click should instead expand/scroll the matching annotation in the AnnotationPanel. Requires routing the map click handler through mapEditorState.setSelectedFeature + a selectedAnnotationId prop on AnnotationPanel. Closes seeds 8dd2 and 6d53.
closeReason: outcome:success — FeaturePopup.onannotate wired through MapCanvas.onfeatureannotate -> MapEditor transitionTo(pickFeature) + editorLayout.rightSection='annotations' + scrollToAnnotationFeatureId. Unified-annotations Phase 2 Task 2 landed.

title: Unified annotations Phase 3: TerraDraw commit writes annotation (not feature)
description: Phase 3 of unified-annotations.md. Collapse features/annotations dual model. TerraDraw tool commit → create annotation row with anchor matching geometry type. features table becomes read-only (populated only by imports). Long-term: migrate features rows into annotations. Data migration, TerraDraw rewrite, DataTable repurpose, 2+ sessions.

title: Unified annotations: backfill path migration for existing line features
description: LineString annotations written before the path anchor type existed used 'measurement' anchor. Post-rollout, audit annotation_objects for type='measurement' with LineString geometry and no 'measurementType' in content — those are the real paths. One-shot migration OR leave as-is (measurement still renders lines).
closeReason: outcome:partial — audit run against dev DB (0 candidates today). SQL audit + migration query preserved in apps/web/docs/plans/notes/unified-annotations-path-backfill.md. Re-run before Phase 3 (baa4) cutover; UPDATE if non-zero.

title: e2e: annotation-groups.spec.ts not yet written
description: Plan manifest declares apps/web/e2e/api/annotation-groups.spec.ts but it was never created. REST coverage for groups should include create, list, update name/visible, delete (and orphan behaviour — annotations' group_id becomes NULL on group delete).
closeReason: outcome:success — annotation-groups.spec.ts written (21 tests covering PATCH name/visible/parent/ordinal, idempotent DELETE, cross-tenant, auth). Audit 22/22.

title: e2e: annotation-convert.spec.ts not yet written
description: Plan manifest declares apps/web/e2e/api/annotation-convert.spec.ts. Cover: convertAnnotationsToLayer (forward: annotation -> feature), convertLayerFeaturesToAnnotations (reverse: feature -> annotation, with name cascade, scope-selected, LineString -> path, skipped MultiPolygon).
closeReason: outcome:success — annotation-convert.spec.ts written (14 tests covering reverse anchor mapping Point→point/Polygon→region/LineString→path, name cascade, round-trip, validation, cross-tenant, auth). Audit 22/22.
